thinks.think: The camera zooms in rapidly from a wide overhead view of a sandy area to a close-up of a redstone circuit. A lever attached to a grey block is flipped into an active state, illuminating the adjacent redstone dust trail with a bright red glow. The green number 13 remains visible above the hotbar at the bottom of the screen.

The camera zooms out from the redstone circuit to reveal a vast, flat sandy landscape dotted with distant structures like a tall white pillar, a tree, and glass enclosures. The player surveys the area with the crosshair centered on the ground, while the hotbar containing a water bucket and the green number 13 stay fixed at the bottom of the screen.

A spherical cluster of red and white particles materializes in the sky above a sand block encased in glass. The particle effect expands outward, resembling a firework explosion. The camera angle shifts slightly closer to the central sand structure as the red dots disperse in a circular pattern against the blue sky.

The red and white particle cluster dissipates into the sky. The camera pans right to reveal a new mechanism featuring a grey piston facing a sand block with a wooden sign attached. A trail of red dust connects the components on the sandy ground near a small dug-out pit.

The camera shifts focus to a grey block with a wooden top and side lever positioned beside a square hole dug into the sand. To the left, a sand block bearing a wooden sign sits stationary. A trail of red dust connects the mechanism components across the beige terrain as the view moves slightly closer to the device.

The view centers on a grey dispenser block with a wooden top situated beside a sand pit. A grey inventory menu labeled "Dispenser" opens, overlaying the scene. Inside the grid, firework rockets appear. A tooltip box displays white text reading "Firework Rocket," "Flight Duration: 3," "Small Ball," and "Light Gray, Red" next to the hovered item.

The open dispenser inventory now contains three stacks of firework rockets in the top row. A cursor hovers over the leftmost stack, revealing a tooltip with white text listing 'Firework Rocket,' 'Flight Duration: 3,' 'Small Ball,' and 'Red, Light Gray' against a dark purple background.

The inventory interface vanishes, exposing the grey dispenser block with a wooden top beside a dug-out sand area. A trail of red dust connects to the back of the block, stretching across the beige terrain. The camera view returns to the third-person perspective of the sandy environment.

The camera moves slightly closer to the grey dispenser block with a wooden top beside a sand pit. The redstone dust trail leading to the mechanism stays dark and inactive on the beige ground. Surrounding desert structures and the player's hotbar remain unchanged during this brief static observation.

The camera tilts sharply downward, shifting focus from the grey dispenser block to the empty square hole dug into the sand beside it. The player's hand, holding a blue water bucket, becomes visible in the bottom right corner as the view looks directly into the pit.

The camera tilts up slightly from the pit, revealing a redstone dust trail leading to the grey dispenser block on the right. The player continues holding a blue water bucket while looking at the empty square hole dug into the sand. A wooden sign on a sand block is visible to the left.

The camera maintains its focus on the grey dispenser block situated beside the square sand pit. A stream of bright blue water blocks suddenly flows horizontally from the mechanism's location towards the left, spreading over the beige terrain. The player's hand, clutching a blue bucket, stays visible in the bottom right corner.

Bright blue water blocks remain stationary next to the grey dispenser. The camera angle shifts, viewing the water and dispenser from above and the side. A wooden sign reading "25 Blocks" is visible in the background near the redstone dust trail. The player's hand holds a blue bucket throughout the sequence.

The camera angle shifts from a high overhead view to a side perspective of the grey dispenser block and adjacent blue water blocks. The player's hand holding a blue bucket remains visible in the bottom right corner. The wooden sign and redstone trail are visible in the background on the sandy terrain.

The camera pans left to reveal a long stream of blue water blocks flowing from the dispenser mechanism. A row of sand blocks with wooden signs attached becomes visible in the distance, linked by a red dust trail. The player's hand holding a blue bucket remains in the bottom right corner.

The camera pans left and tilts up, shifting focus to a distant row of sand blocks with wooden signs linked by red dust. A tall white pillar and tree appear against the blue sky with the sun. The blue water stream stays visible in the lower right, near the player's hand holding a blue bucket.

The camera pans right and tilts down, shifting focus from the distant row of signed sand blocks back to the blue water stream flowing beside the grey dispenser. The player's hand holding the blue bucket remains in the bottom right corner, observing the water flow and the nearby redstone mechanism on the sandy terrain.

The camera pans left, revealing a large purple and blue floating structure in the sky and a beige block mechanism with redstone components to the left. Blue water continues flowing from the dispenser, while the player's hand holding a blue bucket remains in the bottom right corner. A sand block with a wooden sign is now centrally located.

The camera angle lowers, focusing on the blue water blocks pooling around the grey dispenser. The word "Glass" appears in white text above the hotbar near the green number 13. The player's hand holding a blue bucket remains visible in the bottom right as the water spreads across the sand.

The text "Glass" vanishes from above the hotbar, leaving only the green number 13. The camera pans slightly right, revealing a wooden house with a window in the background. Blue water continues flowing from the grey dispenser block, while the player's hand holding a blue bucket remains visible in the bottom right corner.

The player switches the held item from a blue water bucket to a transparent glass block, indicated by the text "Glass" and number "13" above the hotbar. The player then places the glass block on top of the water source block situated next to the grey dispenser with the wooden lever.

A transparent glass block is placed on the water source block beside the grey dispenser. Blue water flows outward from the mechanism across the sand near the new glass cube. The player holds the glass block item, with the green number 13 visible above the hotbar. The camera shifts slightly to view the construction.

The camera pans slightly around the mechanism where a transparent glass block sits atop the water source block next to the grey dispenser. Blue water flows outward from the base while the player holds a glass block in their hand, with the green number 13 visible above the hotbar.

The transparent glass block situated atop the water source shatters, scattering white and blue particle shards into the air. Beneath the broken structure, the blue water source block is now exposed next to the grey dispenser mechanism. The player's hand remains visible holding a glass block item, with the green number 13 floating above the hotbar.

The transparent glass block atop the water source shatters into white and blue particle shards, exposing the blue water block beneath next to the grey dispenser. The player holds a glass block item while the camera views the exposed water source and surrounding sandy terrain with distant wooden structures and redstone trails.

A transparent glass block is placed on top of the blue water source block next to the grey dispenser. Water flows from the mechanism across the sand. The player holds a glass block item. Redstone dust trails connect components on the ground as the camera pans slightly left.

The camera pans left, revealing a long transparent glass wall extending from the dispenser mechanism towards a row of sand blocks with wooden signs. Blue water flows from the grey block, and the player holds a transparent glass block in the bottom right corner.

The camera pans left, revealing a long transparent glass wall extending from the dispenser mechanism towards sand blocks with wooden signs. Blue water flows from the grey block while the player holds a glass block. Redstone dust trails connect the mechanism components on the sandy ground.

The camera pans left along a long transparent glass wall structure built on the sand. A row of sand blocks with wooden signs attached is visible behind the glass. Redstone dust trails connect these blocks to a lever mechanism on a stone block. The player holds a glass block item.

The camera pans right along a row of sand blocks featuring wooden signs and connected by glass panes. A redstone dust trail links these blocks to a lever mounted on the rightmost sand block. The player holds a glass block item while observing the mechanism's end on the sandy terrain.

The camera maintains a steady view of sand blocks with wooden signs connected by glass panes. A redstone dust trail links the blocks to a lever on the rightmost sand block. The player holds a glass block item, observing the stationary mechanism on the flat sandy terrain.

The camera pans right, revealing a wooden house and the water dispenser mechanism with flowing blue water. The glass wall structure and row of signed sand blocks remain visible in the center and left. The player continues holding a glass block item as the view shifts back towards the initial setup area.

The camera pans left, centering a glass enclosure on the sand with a wooden house visible on the right. Blue water flows from a dispenser mechanism near the glass structure. A redstone dust trail connects components on the ground. The player holds a glass block, with the number 13 displayed above the hotbar.

The camera shifts to a high-angle view overlooking a long row of transparent glass blocks extending across the sand. Redstone dust trails run parallel to the glass structure. The player holds a glass block as the view centers on the blue water source and dispenser mechanism.

The camera shifts right, centering on a grey dispenser block with a wooden top as blue water flows onto the sand. A long row of transparent glass blocks extends leftward, paralleled by redstone dust trails. The player holds a glass block, with the green number 13 floating above the hotbar.

The camera maintains a steady view of a grey dispenser block with a wooden top as blue water flows onto the sand. A long row of transparent glass blocks extends leftward, paralleled by redstone dust trails. The player continues holding a glass block item, with the green number 13 floating above the hotbar.

The camera shifts right, centering a grey dispenser block with a wooden top as blue water flows onto beige sand. A transparent glass structure aligns with a redstone dust trail to the left. The player holds a glass block item, indicated by the hotbar icon and green number 13. A purple structure and wooden house stand in the background.

The player switches the held item from a transparent glass block to a blue water bucket, now visible in the hand and selected in the hotbar's first slot. The camera angle shifts slightly closer to the grey dispenser block as blue water continues flowing onto the sand, while the glass structure and redstone trails remain stationary in the background.

The game menu screen appears, overlaying the view with a dark tint. White text reads "Game menu" above grey buttons labeled "Back to Game", "Achievements", "Statistics", "Options...", "Open to LAN", and "Save and Quit to Title". In the dimmed background, the player holds a blue water bucket near the dispenser and glass structure on the sand.

The game menu screen vanishes, replaced instantly by a wooden-textured outro card. Two framed video thumbnails appear side-by-side: the left reads 'THE BEST FIREWORK LAUNCHER' and the right 'REMOTE DETONATING TNT!'. Below, large brown text displays 'Thank You For Watching', 'Subscribe', and 'More Videos'.

The game menu overlay disappears, replaced by a static wooden background. Two framed thumbnails appear: the left shows a machine labeled "THE BEST FIREWORK LAUNCHER," and the right displays an explosion scene titled "REMOTE DETONATING TNT!" Large brown text below reads "Thank You For Watching," "Subscribe," and "More Videos.
